title: Let's meet at Elevate event in London

posts.author: Evita (Evita)
posts.cookedHtml:
Meet eazyBI for monday.com – a natively integrated Business Intelligence and analytics app for monday.com. Powerful custom monday.com reports, charts, and dashboards app for any use case.

Start from dozens of built-in sample reports or create your own. From simple drag & drop reports and charts, to advanced calculations. Visualize, analyze, and explore your monday.com data from any perspective.

Analyze your data by – by item, users, statuses, workspaces, boards, groups, and more. Quickly switch between a dozen chart types to pick the one that suits your data best: table, column, bar, line, area, pie, scatter, bubble, timeline, map, Gantt, or gauge. Add one-click calculations – statistical, trends, cumulative sums.

Use eazyBI widgets to add eazyBI reports and dashboards to monday.com boards to keep teams informed, productive, accountable, and responsible. You can drill into details or across dimensions – all from within the widget. With automatic daily data updates, your reports will always be up-to-date.

Make monday.com your single point of truth by gathering all your data into one place. Import and analyze data from other popular apps and data sources like SQL databases, Google Sheets, CSV or MS Excel files, or REST API.

Find support every step of the way - in a knowledge base of docs, videos & use cases, outstanding BI & tech support, and a user community to help & inspire.

Come by our stand at Elevate London Expo hall for a demo, chat and more information. Let’s meet!
